evidence.snippet: PEGASUS Actuators develops and manufactures high-performance electromechanical [UAV](/knowledge/glossary.html#uav) servo actuators for unmanned aerial vehicles and professional [UAS](/knowledge/glossary.html#uas) applications. Our actuator solutions are used worldwide in UAV flight control, [VTOL](/knowledge/glossary.html#vtol) and [eVTOL](/knowledge/glossary.html#evtol) platforms, as well as payload, gimbal and sensor positioning – wherever precision, reliability and long-term operational stability are essential.

PEGASUS industrial servo actuators are electromechanical drive units of extraordinary power density, precision and reliability.
They consist of a rugged water and dust protected aluminum case. This case comprises a robust steel reduction gear-train, a BLDC or DC motor, and a micro controller managed pc-board.

items.notes: Electromechanical rotary servo actuators (with BLDC motors, hardened steel gear trains, and integrated controllers) for UAV flight control surfaces, swash plates, payload/gimbal positioning. Three product lines: Industrial, Redundant, and OPV (optionally piloted vehicle) actuators.

products_categories.notes: All products are servo actuator mechanisms. No airframe, propulsion, or navigation products.

evidence.snippet:
**Pegasus-Actuators GmbH**
Am Kalkofen 8
D - 61206 Wöllstadt, Germany
German Manufacturer of UAV Servo Actuators

PEGASUS Actuators develops and manufactures high-performance electromechanical [UAV](/knowledge/glossary.html#uav) servo actuators for unmanned aerial vehicles and professional [UAS](/knowledge/glossary.html#uas) applications. Our actuator solutions are used worldwide in UAV flight control, [VTOL](/knowledge/glossary.html#vtol) and [eVTOL](/knowledge/glossary.html#evtol) platforms, as well as payload, gimbal and sensor positioning – wherever precision, reliability and long-term operational stability are essential.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Manufactures servo actuator components sold to UAV OEMs (e.g. LAFLAMME AERO, LIAZ, Elektra Solar, AUTH). Does not make complete drones.

items.name: PA-R Industrial Actuator series
items.product_type: electromechanical UAV/industrial servo actuator (10 SKUs: PA-R-135-4 through PA-R-440-7)

items.name: PA-RR Redundant Actuator series
items.product_type: single-failure-tolerant redundant servo actuator for safety-critical UAV/UAS (5 SKUs: PA-RR-260-8 through PA-RR-720-7)

evidence.snippet:
### PA-RR-260-8 Redundant Actuators
](/product/redundant-actuator/pa-rr-260-8.html)
[](/product/redundant-actuator/pa-rr-260-8.html)
The Pegasus PA-RR-260-8 is the world’s first small redundant servo-actuator for safety-critical unmanned systems, enhancing servo-actuator reliability to an unparalleled level.

items.name: OPV Actuator series
items.product_type: servo actuator with electromagnetic clutch for optionally piloted vehicles (10 SKUs: PA-R-250-8-OPV through PA-RR-720-7-OPV)

evidence.snippet:
### PA-R-250-8-OPV Actuators
](/product/opv-actuator/pa-r-250-8-opv.html)
[](/product/opv-actuator/pa-r-250-8-opv.html)
The Pegasus PA-R-250-8 OPV-servo is the right actuator for applications with high demands on powerful torque and high-speed positioning. With its BLDC - technology (brushless DC motor) and PA-ME contact-less sensor it combines extraordinary reliability and precision.
In conjunction with our PA-RA-3 electromagnetic OPV clutch-assembly this makes a perfect OPV-servo.

products.notes: Full catalog of 25 named SKUs across three families. Custom/special developments (e.g. PA-R-800 integrated OPV actuator) available on request.

ndaa.notes: German manufacturer; no NDAA compliance claim found anywhere in the corpus.

blue_uas.notes: No Blue UAS or Blue sUAS mention anywhere in the corpus.

evidence.snippet: We are proud to be part of another RPV milestone, as our small servo PA-R-135-4 has already completed more than 600,000 flight hours in a customer application without any issues.

What sets PEGASUS Actuators apart is the combination of competitive pricing, reliable on-time delivery and engineering-driven customization. **We offer evaluation samples under fair conditions and support system integration with experienced technical guidance.**

readiness.notes: Catalog products with full specs and downloadable datasheets. ISO 9001:2015 certified (TÜV SÜD, 2019). In-house CNC machining. One product line has 600,000+ flight hours. Also offers custom engineering/special developments as a secondary mode.

tagline: German manufacturer of electromechanical servo actuators for UAV flight control, VTOL platforms, and payload positioning. Product lines span industrial, redundant (single-failure tolerant), and OPV variants ranging from 500 Ncm to 35 Nm torque, rated to 60,000 ft altitude. NDAA and Blue UAS compliance status unknown; no named U.S. prime contracts identified in public record.
